name: shadowhound (ROS 2 Humble)
postCreateCommand: set -e; apt-get update; DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y git python3-vcstool ros-humble-rmw-cyclonedds-cpp python3-ament-package python3-colcon-common-extensions python3-rosdep python3-pip && rosdep init || true && rosdep update || true && chmod +x scripts/ci_preflight.sh && ./scripts/ci_preflight.sh
